description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGreen bag with one main zippered compartmentFlap in front with magnetic closureTop stitch detail on front Patch pocket in front with buttoned flapsZippered pockets in front and back with branding at backInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketTwo short handles for carrying ease with brand pendantMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 32 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 11 cm
